commit_scope: Scope the fkwu (fourth kernel) native-dispatch I/O boundary to its end, with every named gap closed. After an independent Grok review of the emitter internals, the design rides the storage-port carrier the body already proves four-way: the carrier IS the capability-contract (bounded vtable), substrate-core proves functional-vs-live substitutability, and persistence.fk's write_form_binary/read_form_binary IS the marshalling ABI. Primary path: offload a route's pure shape_tree+json_emit slice to fkwu (value-tree in, value out, no host call, no reentrancy/capability surface), the carrier (Go) owning the listener and live I/O. Deferred facility: a host-bound carrier whose ops resolve through one capability-scoped seam, closing capability scoping (carrier handle, not global name), reentrancy (host op is a leaf), cancellation (host-enforced deadline returns an error-value), determinism (substrate-core substitutability), and re-emit blast radius (one arm). Design doc only; no runtime change.

commands: Grounded the scope against source: fourth-shim.fk (Form mirrors), hati-os-kernel-emit.fk (walker tags 3..63 incl. inlined file-I/O syscalls + socket externs), form-flatten.fk (flt-ops; native/user calls indistinguishable by tag), fourth-arm-bands.txt (kernel-http/route bands four-way; host-io family fenced; substrate-core durable I/O four-way via first-class carrier dispatch)
Confirmed Go + Rust carrier native tables (registerNative / register_native) already hold pg_connect/pg_query_rows/http_get/fs_*/file_*
Confirmed the Rust kernel-router image ships no toolchain (JIT cannot fire in prod) and the Go JIT subset covers lists/strings/floats/closures

Grounded the gap-closure in the body's existing four-way patterns: storage-port.fk (carrier = capability-contract, bounded vtable, indirect dispatch), substrate-core.fk (functional-vs-live carrier substitutability), persistence.fk (write_form_binary/read_form_binary = the marshalling ABI)
local_validation.notes: Scope/design doc grounded in the actual emit recipes and band manifest; no code path changed.

deploy_validation.notes: Docs-only; no deploy artifact. The build steps it scopes (Value ABI, host-native vector, carrier seam) are separate future PRs.

phase_gate.notes: Scope only. Next phase is the Value ABI across the fkwu-C <-> carrier boundary, then the host-native vector emit, then a functional-carrier four-way route band.
